Idioma.MSG_NoSeHanAgregadoComponentesAEsteGrupo: -- They Have not Aggregated Components to this Group. --
Idioma.CHK_ConsideradoParaCalculoDePagosPorHora: They considered for calculation of payments for hour
Idioma.CHK_ConsideradoParaCalculoDePagosPorDia: They considered for calculation of payments for day
Idioma.AYUDA_Desglozar: Detachment: This option generates automatically a value type incident concept and associates to the component. In the calculation of the payroll these components will be seen reflected as incidents.
Idioma.AYUDA_Comportamiento: Behavior: It will permit to the user to determine as desires that themselves present the component, in the capture inside the action of personnel. Two special behaviors are: It uses Board, it will permit to associate this
Idioma.AYUDA_SalarioBase: Salary Base: It will identify this component as a base salary concept. If it marks this component as salary base, the present one will be dissociated. This component will be the only one of this type for all the business without impor
Idioma.MSN_NoPuedeExistirOtroComponenteSalarial: Already Exists, not Another Salary Component with the Same Code Can Exist.
Idioma.MSG_DebeSeleccionarUnComponenteParaPoder: It should select a Component, to be able to give maintenance to its methods
